title: Exitcodes
body: Handle exit codes properly.  According to the podman run Man page.

comments.body:
This patch also fixes a huge bug where if we failed to create a container, we left storage mounted.
@mheon @baude @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL
Changes LGTM, but there's all kinds of test unhappiness.

I think this is a flake.  Attempting to merge.
